item.title: It's the unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
Greetings online friends
so much work
cray cray
I’m a fan of shrooms
well, there he is
well, a few people here on Imgur share more than me actually
it works for me
great suggestion
believable
gotta indulge sometimes
i love this meme format
looks pretty damn good to me
gonna have to use that one
but why
crip walking is good for your health
king of the world
that’s it for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: A dump of all the things on my phone pt 2 Saving for posterity
item.description:
If you havent checked out Awoo comics you should. Theyre great
This is one I made myself.
The boy? Deployed
The first of many frog memes to come
The first like 3 seasons of Jackie Chan Adventures was the shit
I just thought this one looked cool.
Mr. Bubz!!!!!
Classic Terry
More avatar
I wish to attain the spiritual chill of a capybara someday
If you dont talk to an animal in a weird voice are you even human?
Im more amazed they got this husky puppy to sit still for the picture tbh
If you dont read this in Picolos voice youre missing out
This one always cracks me up
Also crab memes incoming
A gargoyles meme!
I dont speak or read spanish but I have just enough context to figure this one out
I just love the idea of a talking duck interrupting this convo. Like just imagine a duck with Gilbert Gottfrieds voice walking up and saying this line
I have a friend who said this all the time
This one also is just hella cool
THE FROG!
RESPECT. THE. DEATH BLADES
Theres just not enough good Sokka/Suki content out there
item.dc:creator: searching4somewhere

item.title: Chinese government accounts hate him
item.description: Keep an eye out https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/50_Cent_Party https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Active_measures https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1177/00104140211047403 https://amp.cnn.com/cnn/2023/11/13/us/china-online-disinformation-invs/index.html https://www.justice.gov/opa/pr/40-officers-china-s-national-police-charged-transnational-repression-schemes-targeting-us https://youtu.be/llcx01mKnhc
item.dc:creator: CannonBallNuts

Have fun with this one
I think about this every time I’m dehydrated
I actually tried this, I won’t try it again
Hee-yuck!
Gravity Falls meme

item.title: Never made a snow angel? (with BONUS PANELS!)
item.description:
Keep scrollin for the bonus panels!
I've just unlocked the bonus panels for this one. Merry Christmas, imgur! If you'd like to support the comic (and see all my bonus panels and other exclusive comics), consider signing up to my Patreon! https://patreon.com/LoadingArtist ❤

item.title: Free Iran
item.description: I know the world has been focused on the horrors unfolding in Palestine, but don't forget the citizens of Iran are still being oppressed. Those who participated in the hijab protests are being tracked down and jailed...or worse.
item.dc:creator: samme12345678920

item.title: ~6 years ago, I was sleeping in my car in negative degrees. Today I put up my first Christmas tree.
item.description: It just makes me so happy. It's surreal to think about where I was versus where I am now. Wishing Imgur a safe, warm, happy holiday season. ❤️ Thank you @quietwalker for tips on attaching it to the ceiling-- was super easy. No issues with the cats!
item.dc:creator: TalleyZorah

item.title: my cats' first night in their new home!
item.dc:creator: friendlynoodles

item.title: When you're friends with a bird
item.dc:creator: Cyberball2073

item.title: Five women harassed and revenge porn-ed online get epic revenge on their harasser after tracking him down, finding out he was known to all the victims, and taking the fight to court after the police refused to do anything. 15 years federal prison.
item.description: https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/08/26/revenge-porn-leaked-nudes-police/ This is also the subject of the most recent Darknet Diaries which is an amazing podcast. https://darknetdiaries.com/episode/140/ They tracked down the owner of the images and got the copyright transferred and started filing DMCA on all of it. One of the women is a minor, so do not go searching for the material. Edit: Some people have pointed out that there's a paywall. I use Paywall Smasher but it's higher difficulty to install. Also check the podcast. I would rather turn people onto this podcast because it is amazing. Every episode is redline awesome and you don't have to be a nerd.
item.dc:creator: majortool

I can't do a full on music dump because I am le tired but have a one-two punch my lovelies

item.title: Stop paying rent and normalize squatting on the lawns of the rich
item.description: Related - Jeff Bezos has a real estate portfolio valued at over $500M: https://nypost.com/article/jeff-bezos-houses-real-estate-portfolio/ MV edit: Yes, I know this wouldn’t fly… (for starters, it doesn’t have wings). Be good to one another.

item.dc:creator: CapnAdorable

item.description: Considering the state of the U.S. Legal System, he's lucky he's not also a Sex Offender now as well. Update thanks to @PrinceMaxx7 "The boy peed outside where his mom worked because a sign said "No public restrooms." Original cop found his mother, she apologized & chastised her son for it, cop was satisfied. Then four other Senatobia police officers, including a lieutenant arrived, and her son was arrested, put in a police vehicle and taken to a police station. The child now is upset and fears the police." https://www.cnn.com/2023/12/13/us/mississippi-boy-arrested-urinating-book-report/index.html https://www.fox13memphis.com/news/child-receives-probation-required-to-write-2-page-paper-on-kobe-bryant-after-urination-arrest/article_35c6f53e-992d-11ee-8947-a77ff7ac53f1.html
item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost
